zh.lifeSummary: 當William Marion Hughes於1856年8月9日出生在美國阿肯色州加蘭霍特 斯普林斯 堂史普時，他的父親General Richard Marion Hughes22歲，母親Mary Elizabeth Magby23歲。他於1874年9月3日與Amy Jane Diffee在美國阿肯色州克拉克結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1900年住在美國阿肯色州霍特 斯普林亨德森 堂史普且於1910年住在美國阿肯色州霍特 斯普林俾斯麥。他去世於1912年2月11日在美國阿肯色州霍特 斯普林德 洛奇享年55歲，埋葬在美國阿肯色州霍特 斯普林俾斯麥科華士 希爾 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Hughes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Hugh with genitival or excrescent -s.
Irish and Scottish: adopted as an equivalent of Gaelic surnames based on the personal name Aodh ‘fire’, for example Ó hAodha, Mac Aodha; see McCoy and compare McHugh .

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Marion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

en.lifeSummary: When William Marion Hughes was born on 9 August 1856, in Hot Springs Township, Garland, Arkansas, United States, his father, General Richard Marion Hughes, was 22 and his mother, Mary Elizabeth Magby, was 23. He married Amy Jane Diffee on 3 September 1874, in Clark, Arkansas, United States. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. He lived in Henderson Township, Hot Spring, Arkansas, United States in 1900 and Bismarck, Hot Spring, Arkansas, United States in 1910. He died on 11 February 1912, in De Roche, Hot Spring, Arkansas, United States, at the age of 55, and was buried in Forest Hill Cemetery, Bismarck, Hot Spring, Arkansas, United States.

ja.lifeSummary: William Marion Hughesが1856年8月9日にアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ガーランドホート スプリングズ トウンシュイップで生まれた時，父General Richard Marion Hughesは22歳，母Mary Elizabeth Magbyは23歳であった。1874年9月3日にアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州クラークでAmy Jane Diffeeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1900年にはアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ホート スプリングヘンダーソン トウンシュイップに，1910年にはアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ホート スプリングビスマルックに住んでいた。彼は1912年2月11日にアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ホート スプリングド ロチェで55歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ホート スプリングビスマルックフォーエスト ヒル セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Marion Hughes(이)가 1856년 8월 9일 미국 아칸소 주 가랜드 호트 스플링스 타운시프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 General Richard Marion Hughes(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Elizabeth Magby(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1874년 9월 3일 미국 아칸소 주 클라르크에서 Amy Jane Diffee(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1900년도에 미국 아칸소 주 호트 스플링 헨더슨 타운시프에서, 1910년도에 미국 아칸소 주 호트 스플링 비스마크에서 살았다. 그는 1912년 2월 11일 미국 아칸소 주 호트 스플링 데 록헤에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 아칸소 주 호트 스플링 비스마크 포레스트 힐 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Marion Hughes nasceu em 9 de agosto de 1856, em Hot Springs Township, Garland, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, General Richard Marion Hughes, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Mary Elizabeth Magby, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Amy Jane Diffee em 3 de setembro de 1874, em Clark, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Henderson Township, Hot Spring, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América em 1900 e em Bismarck, Hot Spring, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América em 1910. Ele faleceu em 11 de fevereiro de 1912, em De Roche, Hot Spring, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Forest Hill Cemetery, Bismarck, Hot Spring, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Marion Hughes родился 9 августа 1856 г. в местности хот спрингс тоуншип, гарланд, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени General Richard Marion Hughes было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Elizabeth Magby, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Amy Jane Diffee 3 сентября 1874 г. в местности кларк, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности хендирсон тоуншип, хот спринг, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в 1900 году и в местности бисмаркк, хот спринг, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в 1910 году. Он умер 11 февраля 1912 г. в местности де рош, хот спринг, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности форест хилл кеметири, бисмаркк, хот спринг, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты.
